posle zurke vodim te u kupe
rekla je da hoce sve na kub je

dobra, njna koza meni uvek tako dobra
na ziku moju uvija ko kobra 
i kaze hoce sve, hoce odma
da proba me

Bridz:
nemoj da pricas
nemoj, nema da pricas, nikom
nemoj da pricas
nemoj, nema da pricas ne

Moze bebi al samo na 

Ref:
ticu ticu ticu samo na

ticu ticu ticu samo na 
ticu ticu ticu samo na 
ticu samo na ticu

Strofa 2:
ispomerana lezi tu u mome krevetu
skine sve sa sebe tu je vec noc devetu
i nema sanse da skines parfem
miris jak je, znace da ga lazes

volim kad me zove papi je
volim kad se vodke napije
volim kad me zove tatice
volim kad se vide gacice

ma neka traje 
ma neka traje 
ma nek se daje e e
(tatice)

snippet.title: Yemin 341. B√ґl√Љm Fragmanƒ± | The Promise Season 3 Episode 341 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max. 

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube
Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram
About HBO Max:
HBO Max is WarnerMediaвАЩs direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMediaвАЩs rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO SA RR : VANJA VELJIC - BIVSI DECKO MI JE PRIZNAO DA JE BIO SA MNOM JER SAM JUTJUBERKA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na Hype televiziji u 13h i reprizom od 18:30h i na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Vanja Veljic poznatija kao Va Vana.Da li joj je vaznija ljubav ili karijera i kakve nam nove projekte snimal, saznacete u danasnjoj emisiji , a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

WIIP: https://wiip.rsвАЛвАЛвАЛ

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3...

snippet.title: Yemin 339. B√ґl√Љm Fragmanƒ± | The Promise Season 3 Episode 339 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

snippet.description:
Benim Adƒ±m Melek 66. B√ґl√Љm √Цzet:

AlpayвАЩn √ґl√Љm√Љnden sonra Defne ve Kerem, ne hissedeceƒЯini bilemez bir haldedir. Babalarƒ±na olan √ґfkeleri onun √ґl√Љm√Љ ile s√ґnm√Љ≈Яt√ЉrвА¶ K√Љ√І√Љk Seyitali olan bitenden habersizdir. Melek ve Halil, AlpayвАЩƒ±n √ґl√Љm√Љnden sonra KenanвАЩƒ±n pe≈Яine d√Љ≈Яer. Funda ise panik haldedir. Mektuplarƒ± √ґƒЯrenen Kenan, onun da pe≈Яindedir. Otelden atƒ±lan Funda be≈Я kuru≈Я parasƒ±z sokaklarda kalƒ±r. VildanвАЩƒ±n mektuplardan haberi olmadƒ±ƒЯƒ± ortaya √Іƒ±kmƒ±≈Яtƒ±r. √Цmer ve Z√Љmr√Љt bunu √ґƒЯrenince ne yapacak? Vildan, √Цmer ve Z√Љmr√ЉtвАЩ√Љ affedecek mi? snippet.title: Backyard Squirrel Maze 2.0- The Walnut Heist
snippet.description:
I bit off more than I could chew.  Join me this summer in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

NEW Phat Gus Merch here!! https://markrober.store/

More info about my Creative Engineering Course- 

This class is a hands-on, 30-day learning experience that will teach you how to use engineering and science to bring your creative ideas to life.

During this class, I'm going to share with you my entire creative engineering process from start to finish. You're going to follow along with me as I fully design and engineer 3 brand new builds from scratch... from how I come up with the idea, all the way through bringing the final builds to life.

The best part is, over the month, you'll follow along with me and my process, side by side, and you will leave the class with 3 original, creative builds of your own.

This is the class I wish I had when I was starting out. It's designed to take your skills to make cool stuff to the next level, whether you're a beginner or a more experienced maker/engineer.

The class officially starts on June 7th so claim your spot if you're interested!

See you in class!

-Mark

Zidala je, ≈Њbukala, obnavljala krovnu konstrukciju. Najte≈Њe joj je bilo zidati dimnjak ali i to je uspjela. Biv≈°oj novinarki jedino nedostaje redakcija a sve drugo ima. Zatekli smo je kako s majkom sadi krumpire. Ka≈Њe njezina motika je njezina teretana. Proizvodi eko hranu i dobroga je zdravlja. U svome vrtu ima sve vrste povrƒЗa. Puno bolje se osjeƒЗa na selu gdje provodi ≈Њivot bez stresa u miru, ti≈°ini, ljepoti krajolika. Jedne zime ƒНak je vi≈°e od dvadeset dana bila zametena snijegom a dru≈°tvo su joj bili najƒНe≈°ƒЗe medvjedi koji su prolazili pored kuƒЗe kao da su domicilni. snippet.title: Painting on CLAY
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I wanted to try something a little bit different. I decided to try sculpting with Das air dry clay. I wanted to make some original clay creations and paint them myself. I feel like it's so satisfying to watch sculpting and then painting on clay. I've seen those tiktok clay painting videos hahah. So this has been on my video idea list for a long time. I am very much so a beginner when it comes to clay, so I wanted to stick to some fun and easy things to make with air dry clay. I think air dry clay is much more beginner friendly than polymer clay, and I really enjoyed working with this brand. Although, of course, the most fun part of creating things with clay, is painting and decorating the clay in the end. I ended up making some cute, custom clay figurines, I hope you like them!


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh рЯШВ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

localized.title: Painting on CLAY
localized.description:
Hey guys! Today I wanted to try something a little bit different. I decided to try sculpting with Das air dry clay. I wanted to make some original clay creations and paint them myself. I feel like it's so satisfying to watch sculpting and then painting on clay. I've seen those tiktok clay painting videos hahah. So this has been on my video idea list for a long time. I am very much so a beginner when it comes to clay, so I wanted to stick to some fun and easy things to make with air dry clay. I think air dry clay is much more beginner friendly than polymer clay, and I really enjoyed working with this brand. Although, of course, the most fun part of creating things with clay, is painting and decorating the clay in the end. I ended up making some cute, custom clay figurines, I hope you like them!


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh рЯШВ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

snippet.title: Kurulu≈Я Osman 59. B√ґl√Љm
snippet.description:
Kurulu≈Я Osman 59. B√ґl√Љm √Цzeti:
UMUR BEYвАЩƒ∞N OBASINA MOƒЮOL BASKINI
Osman BeyвАЩin uyarƒ±larƒ±na kulak asmadan MoƒЯollarƒ±n kampƒ±nƒ± basmaya giden Umur Bey ve alpleri, Nikola tarafƒ±ndan uyarƒ±lan Togay tarafƒ±ndan tuzaƒЯa d√Љ≈Я√Љr√Љl√Љr. TogayвАЩƒ±n komutanƒ± Camuha da n√ґkerleri ile birlikte savunmasƒ±z kalmƒ±≈Я Umur Bey obasƒ±na baskƒ±n d√Љzenler. Malhun Hatun ve bir avu√І alp obayƒ± savunmak i√Іin √ґl√Љm kalƒ±m m√Љcadelesine girer.  

Nƒ∞KOLA FIRSATTAN ƒ∞STƒ∞FADE EDƒ∞YOR
Osman Bey ve Togay arasƒ±ndaki anla≈Яmayƒ± bozmayƒ± ba≈Яaran Nikola, d√Љ≈Яmanlarƒ±nƒ±n birbirini kƒ±rmasƒ±ndan faydalanmak isterken; TogayвАЩƒ±n anla≈Яmayƒ± bozduƒЯunu d√Љ≈Я√Љnen Osman Bey, Kayƒ± Obasƒ±вАЩna saldƒ±rƒ± ihtimaline kar≈Яƒ±lƒ±k √ґnlem alƒ±r. 

OSMAN BEY HESAP SORUYOR
Nikola tarafƒ±ndan yalnƒ±z bƒ±rakƒ±lan ve tuzaƒЯa d√Љ≈Яen Umur Bey, ya≈Яadƒ±ƒЯƒ± ba≈Яarƒ±sƒ±zlƒ±ƒЯƒ±n ardƒ±ndan b√Љy√Љk pi≈Яmanlƒ±k ya≈Яar. Umur Bey obasƒ±nƒ±n yaralarƒ±nƒ± sarmak i√Іin derhal harekete ge√Іen Osman Bey, Umur BeyвАЩden ise T√Љrkmenlerin istikbalini tehlikeye atmasƒ±nƒ±n hesabƒ±nƒ± soracaktƒ±r.

MALHUN HATUN MOƒЮOL SALDIRISINA NASIL KAR≈ЮI KOYACAK?
Osman Bey, t√Љm uyarƒ±larƒ±na raƒЯmen ba≈Яƒ±na buyruk hareket eden Umur BeyвАЩde nasƒ±l hesap soracak? Umur BeyвАЩi tuzaƒЯa d√Љ≈Я√Љren Togay, Osman BeyвАЩe kar≈Яƒ± nasƒ±l bir hamle yapacak? Malhun Hatun obasƒ±nƒ± MoƒЯollara kar≈Яƒ± nasƒ±l savunacak? Osman Bey, TogayвАЩƒ±n muhtemel saldƒ±rƒ±sƒ±na kar≈Яƒ± nasƒ±l √ґnlem alacak? Osman BeyвАЩin MoƒЯollarla yaptƒ±ƒЯƒ± anla≈Яmanƒ±n bozulmasƒ±nƒ± Nikola nasƒ±l deƒЯerlendirecek? Osman Bey, Malhun HatunвАЩla evlenme kararƒ±nƒ± yeniden deƒЯerlendirecek mi? Umur Bey ya≈Яadƒ±ƒЯƒ± ba≈Яarƒ±sƒ±zlƒ±ƒЯƒ±n ardƒ±ndan kendini affettirmek i√Іin ne yapacak? 

Oyuncular : Burak √Цz√Іivit (Osman), Nurettin S√ґnmez (Bamsƒ±), Erkan Avcƒ± (Nikola), Didem Bal√Іƒ±n (Selcan), Yƒ±ldƒ±z √ЗaƒЯrƒ± Atiksoy (Malhun Hatun), Seda Yƒ±ldƒ±z (≈Юeyh Edebalƒ±), √Цzge T√ґrer (Bala Hatun), Emre Basalak (G√Љnd√Љz), Burak √Зelik (G√ґktuƒЯ), Teoman Kumbaracƒ±ba≈Яƒ± (Togay), Ahmet Yenilmez (Demirci), Emin G√Љrsoy (Kumral Abdal), YiƒЯit U√Іan (Boran), Abidin Yerebakan (Ak√Іa Dervi≈Я), Buse Arslan (Ayg√Љl), √ЗaƒЯrƒ± ≈Юensoy (Cerkutay), Emel Dede (Gonca), √Цmer AƒЯan (Saltuk), Ay≈Яen G√Љrler (Helen), ≈Юahin Erg√Љney (Umur) ve C√Љneyt Arkƒ±n (Aksakallƒ±)

https://www.facebook.com/atv  
https://twitter.com/atvcomtr   
https://www.instagram.com/atvturkiye/
O, k√ґm√Љr karasƒ± g√ґzleriyle, gaza ve h√Љrriyet ate≈Яini tutu≈Яturacaktƒ±. 

Adƒ±, ErtuƒЯrul Gazi oƒЯlu OsmanвАЩdƒ±вА¶ 

Karanlƒ±ƒЯƒ±n i√Іinde ona yol g√ґsteren вАЬa≈ЯkвАЭ olduвА¶

Kan ve g√ґzya≈Яƒ±yla sulanan topraklarda, g√ґk ekini gibi bi√Іilen; yedi g√ґƒЯ√Љ, yedi yeri, daƒЯlarƒ±, denizleri a≈Яacak bir milletin r√Љyasƒ±nƒ± вАЬa≈ЯklaвАЭ g√ґrd√Љ.

G√Љc√Љn√Љ kƒ±lƒ±cƒ±ndan deƒЯil, вАЬa≈ЯktanвАЭ aldƒ±вА¶ Zorbalƒ±ƒЯa adaletle; k√ґleliƒЯe h√Љrriyetle direnen, tarihin g√ґrd√ЉƒЯ√Љ en b√Љy√Љk imparatorluƒЯa adƒ±nƒ± вАЬa≈ЯklaвАЭ verdi.

72 milleti kƒ±ran bozuk d√Љzene kar≈Яƒ± ba≈Яkaldƒ±rƒ±, mazlumlarƒ±n sessiz √Іƒ±ƒЯlƒ±ƒЯƒ±na umut, Kurulu≈ЯвАЩun adƒ± olduвА¶

Kurulu≈Я OsmanвА¶ 400 √Іadƒ±rlƒ±k bir obadan, вАЬilahi a≈ЯklaвАЭ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluƒЯuna y√Љr√Љy√Љ≈Я√Љn hikayesi.

Abone Olmak i√Іin ; https://bit.ly/2t8pQdU

Osman Bey ve Togay arasƒ±ndaki anla≈Яmayƒ± bozmayƒ± ba≈Яaran Nikola, d√Љ≈Яmanlarƒ±nƒ±n birbirini kƒ±rmasƒ±ndan faydalanmak isterken; TogayвАЩƒ±n anla≈Яmayƒ± bozduƒЯunu d√Љ≈Я√Љnen Osman Bey, Kayƒ± Obasƒ±вАЩna saldƒ±rƒ± ihtimaline kar≈Яƒ±lƒ±k √ґnlem alƒ±r. 

OSMAN BEY HESAP SORUYOR
Nikola tarafƒ±ndan yalnƒ±z bƒ±rakƒ±lan ve tuzaƒЯa d√Љ≈Яen Umur Bey, ya≈Яadƒ±ƒЯƒ± ba≈Яarƒ±sƒ±zlƒ±ƒЯƒ±n ardƒ±ndan b√Љy√Љk pi≈Яmanlƒ±k ya≈Яar. Umur Bey obasƒ±nƒ±n yaralarƒ±nƒ± sarmak i√Іin derhal harekete ge√Іen Osman Bey, Umur BeyвАЩden ise T√Љrkmenlerin istikbalini tehlikeye atmasƒ±nƒ±n hesabƒ±nƒ± soracaktƒ±r.

MALHUN HATUN MOƒЮOL SALDIRISINA NASIL KAR≈ЮI KOYACAK?
Osman Bey, t√Љm uyarƒ±larƒ±na raƒЯmen ba≈Яƒ±na buyruk hareket eden Umur BeyвАЩde nasƒ±l hesap soracak? Umur BeyвАЩi tuzaƒЯa d√Љ≈Я√Љren Togay, Osman BeyвАЩe kar≈Яƒ± nasƒ±l bir hamle yapacak? Malhun Hatun obasƒ±nƒ± MoƒЯollara kar≈Яƒ± nasƒ±l savunacak? Osman Bey, TogayвАЩƒ±n muhtemel saldƒ±rƒ±sƒ±na kar≈Яƒ± nasƒ±l √ґnlem alacak? Osman BeyвАЩin MoƒЯollarla yaptƒ±ƒЯƒ± anla≈Яmanƒ±n bozulmasƒ±nƒ± Nikola nasƒ±l deƒЯerlendirecek? Osman Bey, Malhun HatunвАЩla evlenme kararƒ±nƒ± yeniden deƒЯerlendirecek mi? Umur Bey ya≈Яadƒ±ƒЯƒ± ba≈Яarƒ±sƒ±zlƒ±ƒЯƒ±n ardƒ±ndan kendini affettirmek i√Іin ne yapacak? 

Oyuncular : Burak √Цz√Іivit (Osman), Nurettin S√ґnmez (Bamsƒ±), Erkan Avcƒ± (Nikola), Didem Bal√Іƒ±n (Selcan), Yƒ±ldƒ±z √ЗaƒЯrƒ± Atiksoy (Malhun Hatun), Seda Yƒ±ldƒ±z (≈Юeyh Edebalƒ±), √Цzge T√ґrer (Bala Hatun), Emre Basalak (G√Љnd√Љz), Burak √Зelik (G√ґktuƒЯ), Teoman Kumbaracƒ±ba≈Яƒ± (Togay), Ahmet Yenilmez (Demirci), Emin G√Љrsoy (Kumral Abdal), YiƒЯit U√Іan (Boran), Abidin Yerebakan (Ak√Іa Dervi≈Я), Buse Arslan (Ayg√Љl), √ЗaƒЯrƒ± ≈Юensoy (Cerkutay), Emel Dede (Gonca), √Цmer AƒЯan (Saltuk), Ay≈Яen G√Љrler (Helen), ≈Юahin Erg√Љney (Umur) ve C√Љneyt Arkƒ±n (Aksakallƒ±)

72 milleti kƒ±ran bozuk d√Љzene kar≈Яƒ± ba≈Яkaldƒ±rƒ±, mazlumlarƒ±n sessiz √Іƒ±ƒЯlƒ±ƒЯƒ±na umut, Kurulu≈ЯвАЩun adƒ± olduвА¶

snippet.title: Watch the moment an Israeli air strike hits the Associated Press and Al-Jazeera offices in Gaza
snippet.description:
Israeli air strikes destroyed a¬†Gaza high-rise housing international media offices on Saturday, in an attack The Associated Press described as¬†the latest step by the military to silence reporting from the territory.

The strike on Jala Tower came as¬†the militant group Hamas intensified rocket fire from the besieged enclave towards Tel Aviv¬†after a night in which Israeli air strikes killed¬†at least 10 members of one family in a Gaza refugee camp, the deadliest strike since hostilities erupted earlier this week.
